author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 03 - March/Days 067-073 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Discover the Heart That Calls You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Bring the stiff place into prayer today; the Father can forgive, remain near, and make you His own.
edits.reason: Keeps Moses' honest confession and God's nearness concrete without excusing stubbornness.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Receive Love That Sends You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Tend the ordinary work in front of you today; the Father can make quiet wilderness ground holy.
edits.reason: Turns Moses' ordinary shepherding place into a practical faithfulness step.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Trust Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Receive the true word before the hard room today; covenant mercy can steady what you carry.
edits.reason: Preserves the name-and-sending lens while grounding responsibility in received revelation.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Hope Rise the Father's Welcome into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let God's longer faithfulness answer today's narrow fear; His name still holds more than this moment.
edits.reason: Keeps the generation-to-generation covenant memory as the answer to a pressured horizon.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Carry Beloved Identity into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let the Father's seeing rename one bruised place today; what happened to you is not your final name.
edits.reason: Connects beloved identity to God's attention without denying the reality of harm.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Lean Into Love That Finds You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Turn aside before hurry takes over today; love may be calling your name in the pause.
edits.reason: Keeps the burning-bush attention theme small, memorable, and practical.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry See Again Grace Before Striving into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Rest this Saturday before the holy God who calls you; grace can quiet the need to perform.
edits.reason: Preserves seventh-day Sabbath rest and grace-before-performance without making holiness casual.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
